# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an S3 bucket that stores user-uploaded files and application backups. Allow full read/write access for our application IAM role. Keep the configuration simple - we'll add versioning and lifecycle rules in the next iteration.
# Category: cloud_storage_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: S3 bucket for user-uploaded files and application backups

Parameters:
  ApplicationRoleArn:
    Type: String
    Description: ARN of the application IAM role with full read/write access to the bucket

Resources:
  UploadsAndBackupsBucket:
    Type: AWS::S3::Bucket
    Properties:
      BucketName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-uploads-backups

  ApplicationBucketAccessPolicy:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Policy
    Properties:
      PolicyName: !Sub ${AWS::StackName}-s3-access
      Roles:
        - !Select [1, !Split ["/", !Ref ApplicationRoleArn]]
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action: s3:*
            Resource:
              - !Sub arn:aws:s3:::${UploadsAndBackupsBucket}
              - !Sub arn:aws:s3:::${UploadsAndBackupsBucket}/*

Outputs:
  BucketName:
    Description: S3 bucket name
    Value: !Ref UploadsAndBackupsBucket
  BucketArn:
    Description: S3 bucket ARN
    Value: !GetAtt UploadsAndBackupsBucket.Arn
